title: Constituencies and Voter Turnout (LEFT JOIN)
description: Write a query using a LEFT JOIN to get every constituency from constituency_info along with its turnout_percent from voter_turnout (if available). Return constituency, state, and turnout_percent.

schema: CREATE TABLE constituency_info (constituency_id INTEGER, constituency TEXT, state TEXT)
CREATE TABLE voter_turnout (constituency_id INTEGER, turnout_percent REAL)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT c.constituency, c.state, t.turnout_percent FROM constituency_info c LEFT JOIN voter_turnout t ON c.constituency_id = t.constituency_id

schema: CREATE TABLE constituency_info (constituency_id INTEGER, constituency TEXT, state TEXT)
CREATE TABLE voter_turnout (constituency_id INTEGER, turnout_percent REAL)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT c.constituency, c.state, t.turnout_percent FROM constituency_info c LEFT JOIN voter_turnout t ON c.constituency_id = t.constituency_id
